name: Billing
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Here you can find answers to the following questions:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "How and when am I charged"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "How can I modify my payment information?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Is my credit card safe?"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "How and when am I charged?"}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Shopify"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you're using our Shopify public application, then the charging is performed by the Shopify platform. Please check with Shopify support for more information."}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Other platforms"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We use a platform called "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://chargebee.com/", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Chargebee"}]}, {"text": " to track and issue charges. Charges are made according to the agreed Order Form, in standard conditions on the basis of a rolling 30-day term."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "How can I modify my payment information?"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please visit the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://dashboard.findify.io/account/billing?merchantId=3806", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Merchant Dashboard"}]}, {"text": " > Account> Section to alter your credit card information."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/V2EYBPCL2VB3/1.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/V2EYBPCL2VB3/1.png", "name": "1.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 86646, "width": 1543, "height": 889, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 484, "dateInserted": "2025-09-18T17:29:48+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "\n"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Is my credit card safe?"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Absolutely. We use a payment gateway called "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.braintreepayments.com/", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Braintree"}]}, {"text": ", which is also used by other familiar, global companies such as Airbnb, Uber, Tictail, OpenTable, Hotel Tonight and Github."}]}]
